creator: roelof@nisser.com
text:
Some ports put their docs in a subdirectory of /usr/local/share/doc. So
not xfig. This is not convenient in that easy localisation by standardisation
is lost. E.g. I have opened up that hierarchy through apache.

How-To-Repeat: 
	

run 'make install' in /usr/ports/graphics/xfig
